description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte gray and black color scheme. It has a skeletonized fixed stock at the rear, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine with visible cartridges. The upper receiver is fitted with a large optical scope, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting. The barrel is relatively short and robust, with no visible muzzle device attached. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a skeletonized fixed stock, optical scope, and detachable box magazine in a matte gray and black finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, large scope, and detachable magazine with visible cartridges.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the alignment of the stock, scope, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the magazine and scope clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel end, scope, and the symmetry of the stock and receiver.
